SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-26-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MEI HUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAN LIU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER CONNIE CHUNG VIA ZOOM. THIS CASE IS HEARD WITH CSM-21-864096 & 20-863893. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUNACE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUGUST 9, 2021. SMALL CLAIMS MATTERS RE: NON-PAYMENT OF RENT ARE NOT BEING HEARD UNTIL AFTER JULY 31, 2021. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNG, MEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIU, DAN SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FROM MAR-15-2021 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON MAY-26-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MEI HUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAN LIU IS PRESENT. THIS MATTER IS FOR NON-PAYMENT OF RENT AND UTILITIES. MATTERS RE: NON-PAYMENT OF RENTS ARE NOT BEING HEARD IN SMALL CLAIMS UNTIL AFTER JULY 31, 2021. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STATE THAT THIS IS NOT COVID -19 RELATED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
